subject: A burning underworld scene with skeletal humanoid figures engulfed in flames amid jagged rocks and erupting fire
description: A hellish landscape of fire and brimstone dominates the frame. Skeletal or charred humanoid figures stand or stagger amid towering flames that erupt from the ground and surround them. Jagged dark rock formations rise from a cracked, fiery floor. The palette is overwhelmingly red, orange, and yellow against silhouetted black forms, with the brightest light radiating from the flames themselves. The composition reads as a wide infernal scene rather than a single portrait, with multiple figures visible being consumed.
foreground: burning skeletal figures and jagged stone amid roaring flames
background: wall of fire, smoke, and silhouetted rock spires of the underworld
